title: hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. malyanum
intro: Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. malyanum is a subspecies of the Hieracium cydoniifolium plant, a type of hawkweed that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. malyanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or capsules.
